name: swarm-pi-code-plugin
description: Dual-host Claude Code and Codex plugin backed by the embedded Pi coding-agent SDK

scripts.lint:tooling: oxlint --deny-warnings scripts/check-documentation-impact.mjs scripts/generate-doc-screenshots.mjs scripts/install-git-hooks.mjs scripts/plugin-version.mjs scripts/validate-doc-screenshots.mjs
scripts.fmt: oxfmt src tests scripts/check-documentation-impact.mjs scripts/generate-doc-screenshots.mjs scripts/install-git-hooks.mjs scripts/plugin-version.mjs scripts/validate-doc-screenshots.mjs
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check src tests scripts/check-documentation-impact.mjs scripts/generate-doc-screenshots.mjs scripts/install-git-hooks.mjs scripts/plugin-version.mjs scripts/validate-doc-screenshots.mjs
scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run lint:tooling && npm run fmt:check && npm test && npm run docs:screenshots:validate && npm run check:runtime-parity
